market_news.summary: Novig is building a peer-to-peer sports trading platform that allows users to trade directly against one another rather than bet against the house.

market_news.title: As Hormuz crisis eases, gas prices may drop—other costs like groceries and home goods could stay high for a while
market_news.summary: Oil prices are falling after a tentative agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but broader relief from higher prices may take time.

market_news.title: Self-driving tech supplier Mobileye targets U.S. robotaxi launch in 2027
market_news.summary: Self-driving technology supplier Mobileye Global announced it would launch its own robotaxi service Tuesday.

market_news.title: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
market_news.summary: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.
